targets.expr: sum by (method, route, status) (rate(http_requests_total{environment=~"$environment", instance=~"$instance", route=~"$endpoint", status=~"$status"}[1m]))

sum(rate(http_request_duration_seconds_sum{environment=~"$environment", instance=~"$instance", route=~"$endpoint", status=~"$status"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(http_request_duration_seconds_count{environment=~"$environment", instance=~"$instance", route=~"$endpoint", status=~"$status"}[5m])), 0.001)
